title: Callipteris elegans
taxonomy: Callipteris elegans is classified as a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae and is part of the genus Callipteris. It belongs to the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. The classification also places Callipteris elegans within the class Polypodiopsida and the phylum Tracheophyta. Further, it can be identified as a member of the order Matoniales. This species is native to the tropical regions of Asia, where it can be found growing in humid environments.
